examples: Please applaud or boo as appropriate, so we can make the next act even better.
I think I've made a boo-boo.
O.K. I made a boo-boo. I apologize.
Audience members boo Republican candidate Rudy Giuliani as he answers a question about gun control.
Clad in their polka-dot and plaid pajamas, the Parmas grabbed their dog, Boo, and fled.
